name: proxmox-mcp-server
description: Manage Proxmox VE (VMs, containers, snapshots, storage, backups) over MCP.

proxmox_host.title: Proxmox host URL
proxmox_host.description: Full base URL including port, e.g. https://pve.local:8006

proxmox_token_id.title: API token id
proxmox_token_id.description: In the form USER@REALM!TOKENID, e.g. mcp@pve!mcp

proxmox_token_secret.title: API token secret
proxmox_token_secret.description: The token UUID shown once when the token is created

proxmox_insecure_tls.title: Accept self-signed TLS certificates
proxmox_insecure_tls.description: Only for labs with a self-signed certificate

pve_readonly.title: Read-only mode
pve_readonly.description: When on, only read tools are registered (no writes or deletes)
